top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    i_category,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN customer_address ON ws_bill_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY 
    ca_state,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    ca_state,
    i_category
LIMIT 100
